textByHash.06006c604d57ef331029e9de1bd3af8c27f76bd3: Music should never be used to kill.
textByHash.0fc070d9172c5704ea9b3490c351e07762c0d8a2: It's not that difficult. Here, take these.
textByHash.1a5089b51ffa887ba10f69b503ee6ce439b194ec: If you killed me, you'd never learn my technique.
textByHash.1b4c12c81eeb5de5e715914289f2e134f9f6702a: There you go. Now if you don't mind, I'm busy performing.
textByHash.258ce78e54ae35fcaf40abd6459687b19c348dc3: I'm not stopping you! You have your own snake charming flute.
textByHash.2ac783a0bd3c0693c216bdefb9410951dac1c57e: Well, play the music that's on the sheet and that should do the trick.
textByHash.361a46fd23064e7009f8eff92e0ee0c8a9b060bc: Ah, I see you've lost your basket. Here you are, now leave me alone! You're ruining the show.
textByHash.439379492abf47056d54f119055246967c66bfb0: If it means that you'll leave me alone, I will happily give you my snake charming super starter kit, complete with flute and basket. But you're clearly over burdened as it is.
textByHash.4dec94cbe87fcf301340fcd0048acf13cd78d309: That depends. How much are you willing to pay?
textByHash.525f55ee1d0a219313c79bc451b9020c78350f54: I'll do it for half the price.
textByHash.588b91ad98cbb5be58d68cbc975283855c484d60: If you're that desperate to try, have my patented snake charming starter kit. It comes with a special snake charming flute and a basket to keep your charmed snakes in. Now, leave me alone!
textByHash.631491cdf71b4be95c6e1105a9452b67527d1534: When I first met Felkrash we sang about love, not war.
textByHash.6d95b53c92228a3c3e05d021f99423847db53fe1: Ah, I see you've lost your snake charming flute. Here you go, now leave me alone! You're distracting my punters... er, I mean, crowd.
textByHash.799ac0a594c0e69af162df16fd64397ef679a792: You're a resourceful looking adventurer. I'm sure you'll figure something out.
textByHash.85120cbbea862f80d63b062bd12a99d9e9aa75ea: Good luck finding someone else to help...
textByHash.9e4fb36cde5552e0973917c6eefa1891f9cecfa3: Do you remember that flute I gave you?
textByHash.a13a5f6017351bec4f97a53bcb45cbc8d836394f: I'd give you a flute to go with it, but I see you've kept the last one I gave you!
textByHash.bc38ad367ffeb04905f0d35be32e4ed13078c636: That might depend on how the drink tasted.
textByHash.c038fcd752903dc621c33485393cb6161571f364: I taught her all she knows about animal charming, and then she used my knowledge to kill!
textByHash.cb60902635ab980f3ae30e81daf7dea42f6ced79: Oh, things were a lot better in those days.
textByHash.cfa5d43b501b1a8c1f07de226d68405fcc2c1877: I'll do it for quarter the price.
textByHash.d61c591360ec9467203fdbdedd381e553c4dd3db: No, I doubt it. I believe your talents lie in other areas.
textByHash.da73df55ca80bfeded087fcf5efe8a6e6fdf91c4: What? I'm offering something invaluable, and you'll quibble over a couple of coins?
textByHash.dfd0d6e47faa716b32517adbdffb57a8742edea1: Study the sheet music carefully. Playing it on the flute will draw rats to you like flies to a bucket of camel dung.
textByHash.ebe9e47bbed6f9a830b888a781b4919c3bb0f339: There you go. Now if you don't mind I'm busy trying to charm this here snake.
textByHash.f54511eb6c9f9c7bebec458cef293e458c9df512: I'd say thank you very much and take it.
